response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and significant leadership in developer tools, testing, and open-source projects, but his people management experience is limited to informal or short-term roles (e.g., organizing workshops, code katas). His technical expertise in build systems and mobile platforms is not clearly demonstrated, and his recent roles lack direct alignment with the engineering productivity focus required for this position.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and open-source contributions
Strong leadership in technical education and mentorship (e.g., workshops, code katas)
Extensive full-stack development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (only informal or short-term roles)
No clear experience leading organizational change or mobile-platform-specific developer tools
Recent roles are more focused on full-stack development than engineering productivity
